description:
LOCATION LOCATION LOCATION
Smoke-free spacious cozy independent Studio apartment, 3rd floor Rooftop of our home. Capture the views and shore breeze of Miraflores from a remodeled terrace around the apartment. True feeling of mod Miraflores flair. Ocean border views and Parque Kennedy short walk away! Family groupings can be accommodated. Please see other listings at same guest house. Please provide arrival time to coordinate check-in. No pets, no smoking, no parties.

The space
Description PLEASE READ IN FULL. MOST OF YOUR QUESTIONS ARE ANSWERED HERE.
You will stay in an apartment on the third floor of our house, with total independence, a full kitchen and access to a large terrace with furniture, table, chairs and a hammock. Independence and private auxiliary exit. Upon arrival, you'll receive the keys from our hosts or a member of the house team. Feel free to send your questions directly and we will get back to you quickly.

We offer weekly cleaning and optional linen washing at no cost. If the guest prefers to do their own cleaning, there are utensils that they can use to clean if they wish.

Best location in Miraflores!
Close to Comandante Espinar Avenue and Jose Pardo Avenue. Close to shops, gourmet restaurants and fast food/takeaway places, churches, public transportation and the busy shopping and tourist area of Miraflores. We are a stone's throw from the famous pre-Inca ruins Huaca Pucllana, and 10 minutes from the Miraflores Esplanade to enjoy great ocean views.

Additional person: US $8.

Services:
Cable TV,
Flat-screen TV
Internet
Coffee maker
salt, pepper, sugar, oil
Gas stove
Full fridge
Water filter
Microwave oven
Electric kettle
Blender
Pots, dishes, utensils and sharp knives!

Other information about the Studio and services:

The kitchen is fully stocked with pots, pans, cookware, dishes, cutlery and glasses. The kitchen sink includes a filtered water dispenser.

In the bedroom we have a full size double bed (Full), with sheets, blankets and bedspread, with space for 3 people. The main bed has a twin size bed underneath. (If you come as a family group, we could accommodate the family in other private rooms within the same house).

We provide travel-size personal toiletries (only upon arrival):
Toilet paper, soap, toothpaste, shampoo.

We offer weekly washing of sheets and towels, weekly deep cleaning. The cleaning lady usually comes on Wednesday and Saturday mornings, and we trust her completely.

If you prefer that our cleaning lady does not do the weekly cleaning, please let us know. We have brooms and cleaning supplies in case you want to do your own cleaning.

Privacy: There are no cameras or recording devices in any of our Airbnb spaces, nor on the terrace.

From the bathroom or bedroom door you can access a large and cozy covered terrace, equipped with patio furniture, which surrounds the apartment. You can use that terrace (terrace is not for exclusive use).

Adjacent to the terrace is the laundry area, where there is a washing machine, and a clothesline where you can put your clothes to dry. In cold seasons, if the clothes take a long time to dry, you can access the second floor and use our dryer.

Use of washer and dryer: We accept a contribution of 15 soles per wash. (No cost after 1 month of accommodation).

Portable air conditioning equipment for the summer.
Space heater to keep you warm on Lima's cold and humid autumn and winter mornings.

Safety: Please close the Studio door when you leave and check that the lights, TV, air conditioning, etc. are not left on.

Guest access
Guests have access to the studio unit, with their own set of keys. The main access is through a gated courtyard \the Quinta\" (KIN-tah) our home is one of 7 townhomes in this courtyard

description:
Is a beautiful big place. We will like to make our home your house. Is very spacious and we have a nice kitchen well equip. We are super host and take pride of what we do.

The space
Located 1 block from Marriott hotel and casino. 2 blocks from LarcoMar seaside shopping mall, less than 10 minute drive to Central, the number 1 rated restaurant in the world. Very quiet street for Miraflores. Spacious non-smoking apartment with 3 bedrooms with 3 and 1/2 bathrooms. We also have a large living room/dining room, leather sofas, recessed lighting, a glass table for 8 people, a fully equipped kitchen, a balcony, hardwood floors throughout,. and a great bilingual hostess who can help plan your adventure. Located near Peru's best organic farmer's market (BioFeria), Vivanda upscale supermarket, Wong and Metro supermarkets, many small restaurants, casinos, clubs and a sports bar. Miraflores is one of the safest neighborhoods in Lima, with good transportation.
Sleeps 5 adults comfortably with organic sheets and duvets throughout. With children you could accommodate 6 or 7 depending on age.
The Master bedroom has a king size bed, an in-suite bathroom, with a bathtub/shower, a walk-through closet, a mirrored wall, 2 night tables, and a safe box for your passports.
The second bedroom is furnished with a two twin beds and a closet.
The Third bedroom has one twin bed with a wall mounted tv, a closet and night table with a lamp.
The second bathroom has a shower with glass doors. The third bathroom was meant to be for the maid but you are more than welcome to use it. It is small and has only a shower. The fourth bathroom is the guest bathroom off the living room and has no shower or bath.
The kitchen is fully equipped with gas stove, a refrigerator, a coffee maker, a toaster, a microwave oven and a rice cooker.
There is also a laundry room with a washer and dryer for your convenience.
Carla is bilingual hostesses who can help with travel plans, arrangements, and tips for sightseeing.
Other services are offered for an additional charge:
1. Grocery shopping- either conventional or organic.
2.Airport pick-up and delivery.
3.Laundry service.
4.Early check-in or late check-out. We try to be flexible, and the charge may be waived depending on our bookings.

Guest access
You can use the lobby. You are more welcome to talk there

Other things to note
If you need more blankets or need something just call us and we will make ourselves available to answer your questions.

It has 4 bedrooms, 3 full bathrooms, kitchen, fans, laundry, equipped. *Air conditioning ONLY in the master bedroom*. Complimentary quick cleaning for minimum reservations of 7 nights. The apartment now has 4 bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms. The master bedroom has a queen bed, a TV, air conditioning and a bathroom; the second bedroom has a queen bed and a TV, the third; a queen-size bunk bed and the fourth bedroom a single bed with a bathroom. Bedrooms 2 and 3 will share the bathroom that is in the hallway.

Please note that there is ONLY air conditioning in the master bedroom; in the other areas there are fans.

In the living room, there is a 1-person futon bed where one person would comfortably sleep. The total capacity of the apartment is for 8 people.

The kitchen is fully equipped as well as the laundry room and all areas.

For the first night, we give you a complimentary bottle of water, toilet paper, filters, garbage bags, etc., the necessary and indispensable until you can go to the supermarket.

For minimum reservations of 7 nights, we give you a quick complimentary cleaning, with prior coordination and availability of the cleaning staff (no change of bed linen or towels). The day and time would be informed to the person in charge of the reservation.

Free parking for one car (the space is narrow. For example, the Honda Pilot model fits very tightly). Garage measurements: 2.30 wide x 4.60 long.

Review our rules and recommendations!

¡Welcome!

Guest access
The parking lot is a bit tight. It is recommended to inform the model of the car / truck to confirm whether or not it enters the space (take the model of the Honda Pilot truck as a reference. It enters very tightly to the space).

Send the license plate number of the car to coordinate its access and the delivery of the remote control of the parking lot.

Garage dimensions: 2.30 wide x 4.60 long.

Other things to note
Summary of MLA Apartments Guest Rules

Key Points for a Pleasant and Safe Stay

1. Check-in and Check-out Times: Normally, check-in is at 4:00 p.m. and check-out is at 11:00 a.m., except for some specific apartments where check-in is after 3:00 p.m. Prompt check-out is mandatory; late check-ins incur a penalty. Early check-in and late check-out have an additional cost (50% of the regular nightly rate). They require coordination and payment in cash.
2. Last-minute Reservations: There may be delays in the delivery of the apartment. It is important to inform the guest of your arrival time to coordinate check-in.
3. Early Access: This is only possible if you have paid for early check-in or if there is availability, after prior coordination.
4. Concierges: They are not affiliated with MLA Apartments and are not trained to assist guests. Any questions should be directed to MLA Apartments staff.
5. Guest Information: A complete guest list and vehicle information must be sent in advance if a garage is required.
6. Parking: Includes one car or truck (subject to availability). Some apartments may offer two garages upon request and coordination.
7. Common Areas: Only available in some buildings and subject to rules and reservations.
8. Amenity Kit: For the first night only (toilet paper, water, basic amenities).
9. Complimentary Quick Cleaning: Weekly for stays of 7 nights or more (no change of bed linens or towels).
10. No Smoking: Smoking is prohibited in any area of ​​the apartment or in common areas. Violation of this policy carries a US$500 fine.
11. Luggage: There is no luggage storage, but luggage can be left at the reception desk of another nearby building. Please inquire and coordinate.
12. Gatherings and Parties: These are not permitted under any circumstances. Failure to comply with this policy will result in a penalty and eviction without refund.
13. Care of Property: The guest is responsible for bed linens, towels, furniture, and appliances. Damages or stains will be charged upon request.
14. Registered Guests Only: Only those included in the reservation may stay overnight. Visitors, changes to the list, or subletting are prohibited.
15. Security: It is recommended that money and valuables be kept in the safe. Access by outsiders is prohibited.
16. Child Care: Balconies and windows do not have special child protection; supervision is requested.
17. Pets: Pets are not allowed.
18. Group Party Reservations: Reservations for bachelor/bachelorette parties, birthday parties, or other celebrations are not accepted.
19. Contract and Guarantee: In some cases, a signed contract and a refundable security deposit (US$150 to US$500) are required. Please inform your purpose of travel to confirm whether this applies to your reservation.
20. Opening Hours: Staff are open Monday through Sunday, 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. There is no 24/7 service. Please maintain communication in case of emergencies.

Thank you for respecting these rules and helping everyone enjoy a safe and pleasant stay!

Full bathroom with 24/7 hot water.
High-speed WiFi and access to Netflix, Amazon Prime, YouTube, and cable TV.

Comfort, convenience, and style — all in one place.

Easy access by taxi or ride-sharing apps.

listing_name: Stylish duplex in the heart of Miraflores
description:
Spacious, bright and stylish duplex in the heart of Miraflores.

Cozy social area on the 4th floor and two comfortable bedrooms on the 5th, perfect for resting in privacy.

Self check-in, equipped kitchen, 200 Mbps fiber optic internet, elevator and 24/7 security.

Ideal for couples or business travelers looking for comfort and a great location. Steps from restaurants, cafes, shops and just 8 min walk from Larcomar, the esplanade and the beaches.

The space
Experience the best of Miraflores from this spacious and stylish duplex, perfectly located in the heart of the district. Just 4 blocks from Larcomar and very close to the esplanade, beaches, restaurants, supermarkets, stores, pharmacies, and parks. Everything is within walking distance so you can enjoy Lima to the fullest.

The apartment occupies the 4th and 5th floors of a classic building with an elevator and 24/7 security. On the top floor you will find two spacious bedrooms, both with queen beds (2.00 m x 1.52 m), good natural lighting, spacious closets and privacy. On the lower level is the social area: a cozy and bright living room overlooking the trees on the street, a dining room for 4 people, a fully equipped kitchen and a laundry room with a washer and dryer.

✔ Self check-in; we have a 24/7 doorman; we leave the keys in a lockbox with a code.
✔ Kitchen with 4 burners, oven, refrigerator, microwave, kettle, blender, rice cooker, Italian coffee maker, dishes and utensils for 4 people
Full ✔ bathroom with hot water, towels, hairdryer, shampoo and body soap
High-speed ✔ internet (200 Mbps fiber optic)
Weekly cleaning✔ service included for stays longer than 7 days

Perfect for couples, families or business travelers looking for comfort, design and an unbeatable location to explore the best of Lima.

Guest access
The building has 24-hour access thanks to the concierge service. Upon arrival, they will present their ID and be allowed to enter. No bookings made for third parties are allowed.

For safety reasons and compliance with building regulations, we require:
- Photo of the identity card or passport of all guests
- We also use the passport number of the booking holder to file our rental tax returns.

Please review the house rules before booking:
- No Smoking
No events or parties allowed.
- No pets allowed

We appreciate your understanding and cooperation in ensuring a safe and enjoyable stay.

Other things to note
We take great care of our space and always want to offer a clean and comfortable environment for our guests. Therefore, for stays of 7 nights or more, it will be necessary to coordinate the visit of cleaning staff to clean the apartment and change the sheets and towels. This cleaning will be repeated every 7 days for the duration of the stay and takes around 5 to 6 hours. We appreciate your understanding and cooperation.

listing_name: FEELS LIKE HOME | breakfast | comfortable | clean
description:
Welcome to Feels like home!, a place that has been especially decorated with dedication and love from your hosts Rina and Stephanie. Here, you will find a little piece of Peru and learn about its customs, the delicious gastronomy and its people. We invite you to spend a comfortable night (or several) in this private room for 2 people with a queen bed.
Our close location to the airport is perfect for your short stay!

We remain attentive to you.

The space
Conveniently located 15-20 min taxi ride from Lima's International Airport Jorge Chavez. We're on the third floor of a five-storey building. Please note that you'll have to go up 3 flights of stairs to reach the apartment since we do not have an elevator in the building. You'll find a buzzer for our apartment marked on the left-hand side of the building entrance that faces the road, ring the buzzer and the host or someone in charge will come down to get you.
We welcome single or double occupancy in the private room which is equipped with a queen size bed, a night stand, a lamp, and a desk for your convenience. You'll find towels and blankets on your bed upon arrival and toiletries are available upon request. Also, please note that we do have one other room within the same apartment that we rent to Airbnb guests so expect to share the common spaces with more than one guest during your stay.
Breakfast is included and served daily from 6 to 8am exclusively.


Let us know if there's anything else we can do to make your stay more
memorable!

Guest access
Our guests will have access to common spaces such as bathroom, living room, dining area and kitchen area. Please discuss the schedule and use of the washing machine with your host.
Theres is an additional cost of 15 soles per load and that includes the detergent. NOTE: the washing machine is in SPIN-DRY modality which means, it does not dry clothes completely and you will need to hang them on racks and let them air dry.

During your stay
Your hosts are mother and daughter, friendly and honest people who will go the extra mile by providing anything that's necessary to make you feel at home. Rina is fluent in Spanish and has basic knowledge of English but will make every effort to communicate with you and make you feel at home. Stephanie is fluent in Spanish, English, and Portuguese. listing_name: Lovely flat in center Miraflores near seaside
description:
Cozy, well-equipped apartment on a quiet street in the center of Miraflores. Just steps from the Malecón Cisneros, from where you can enjoy magnificent ocean views on a beautiful 30-minute walk to the iconic Larcomar, or to the Bridge of Sighs in Barranco (1 hour 20 minutes). Ideal for discovering the best restaurants in Miraflores and Barranco, and with quick access to the beach, surf schools, and parapuerto (paragliding). It has 400mbps internet for those who need to work during their trip.

The space
The apartment is very cozy and spacious (70 m2). It is well furnished and equipped for you to spend a great stay feeling as if you were at home. It is located in Miraflores, the tourist neighborhood of Lima, which in addition to being a safe place where you can go out in peace at all times, offers innumerable attractions either on foot or by bicycle. It consists of a bedroom with a queen bed, a fully equipped kitchen, a living room with a two-seater sofa bed, a dining room and a complete bathroom with a clothes washer-dryer machine.
The apartment is rented with bedding, towels and kitchenware.
Additionally, we have a playpen/crib for small babies (up to 12 months) that can be used with prior coordination.

Guest access
The building has a permanent concierge (24x7). The common area with swimming pool, BBQ and fronton court are available without any charge. Also, a reception room can be used to receive short visits if required. All common areas can be used prior coordination with the building's concierge.

Other things to note
A few steps from the building is the Wong shopping center, where you can find everything you need for your stay (supermarket, restaurants, shops and pharmacy). Also, the tourist information center, exchange office and sale of mobile chips is situated just 3 minutes walk.
Towards the opposite direction, 100 meters from the building, the Good Hope Clinic is located, which has 24-hour emergency service.

All of this can be accompanied by our own homemade natural products: Peanut Butter, Fruit Jam and our Granola made with Andean Superfood Grains (Popped Quinoa and Amaranth mixed with oat, raisins and peanuts); all naturally sweetened with Chancaca (Unrefined Cane Sugar Syrup) and totally free of preservatives and artificial additives.
Other vegan and gluten free options are available.

Fan story for summer season

Bed with clean sheets and duvet, I leave clean towels for each guest

description:
Perfect location in Miraflores. 2min walk to the best shopping center/mall in Lima (Larcomar Shopping Center), with dozens of shopping stores, best restaurants, casinos, best night clubs, bars, movie theater, hair saloon, grocery store and much more.

The space
This Luxury rental is available for business travelers, tourists and short term executive renters. We have an amazing brand new apartment freshly decorated, fully furnished even with new bed sheets, new comforter and new pillows for your full confort, as well as one new mattress and new dinning table and many more. Located in the heart of this exclusive district of Lima, Miraflores.

The apartment is located in one of the best areas of Lima and is in a safe and convenient location extremely close to restaurants, health spa, nightlife, public transportation, beaches, and hot tourist destinations. Our apartment is located approximately 35 min from Lima's Jorge Chavez International Airport, which makes a perfect spot to rest before and after traveling to Cuzco or any other destination around Peru.

The apartment comes fully furnished and equipped with all the essentials you need to make your stay in Lima feel like Home. Our apartment building has 24 hour security personnel.

The building is a brand new building with two level parking structure and 2 elevators for the residents. The street is very secure and quiet, perfect located to all the amenities of the surroundings. There is very low noise and very low traffic.

Guest access
You'll be able to access every corner of the apartment, starting from the big and spacious living room, to all 4 rooms and 3 1/2 bathrooms, kitchen, balcony, laundry and one private parking lot.

Other things to note
If so happen that your flight got delayed or departs late at night and/or after your check-out time (10:00am), you can stay until 6:00pm at the apartment waiting for your flight for only $60, only if the same day is not booked already by another guest. Please consult with me if you desire to extend your stay for a half day or full night. This also applies for any luggage that you would like us to hold/secure for you after your check-out.

Also, if you desire to check-in earlier than the regular check-in time (4:00 pm), it could be arranged for just $60 as well. Please verify with me via message if the date is available for earlier check-in.

description:
Stylish 2-bedroom apt. in the heart of Barranco with 2 ensuite bathrooms, fast WiFi, & dedicated workspaces, perfect for remote work & longer/shorter stays.
Bright, newly renovates comfy spaces with new high-quality linens, pillows, blackout curtains, & a calm atmosphere designed for rest & productivity, fresh paint, floor & appliances & fully equipped kitchen.
Located in a modern building with pool, gym, and top cafés, restaurants, and shops just steps away in Lima’s most vibrant neighborhood

The space
This 2 bedroom apartment is packed with awesome amenities. Every single item in this apartment is brand new.
Rooms:
Spacious and bright rooms with a queen bed, beautiful headboards and lots of closets and drawers for storage. Lovely workspace and black out curtains that let you get a good night's sleep or enjoy your mid-afternoon nap. Finely selected bed sheets of 100% egyptian cotton. Both bedrooms have an ensuite bathroom with a tub for you to enjoy and relax in!
Kitchen:
Fully equiped with brand new appliances for you to help yourself! Toaster, blender, electric kitchen, fridge, coffee maker, you name it, we have it all!
Sitting Room/Tv Room:
Fully equiped with a 42\ TV for you to enjoy netflix or a PS3 game as well as cable tv. Nice books for reading and magazines to enjoy!

The building has some super nice shops outside: From a trendy vegan-friendly mini market with excellent food and beauty products
room_type:
two cafe's with great food and coffee (both with super fast delivery service right to your doorstep until midnight!) a very popular and super trendy clothing store and one of the best ice cream parlours in the city! You won't be dissapointed!

Guest access
The whole apartment is at your disposal as well as the swimming pool

which is beautifully equipped with new equipment. The same with the laundry area. Everything is at your disposal! Just enjoy!

Ken and I bought this super nice apartment as our first home together. Slowly and with a lot of excitement we started to equip our apartment

listing_name: Nice vintage style apartment Miraflores -Queen bed
description:
Cozy and recently refurbished apartment located in an exclusive and quiet residential area a few blocks away from the core of Miraflores, perfect fo
r a peaceful rest after a day full of activities, nonetheless surrounded by exclusive comercial area.
Ten minutes walk to the ocean front promenade and 4 minutes walk to the Metropolitano bus for downtown historical Lima.

The space
This is a 70 m2 (750 ft2) independent apartment, recently restyled with designer furniture located on a second floor with direct access to the street, with good natural light and well-ventilated. It can easily accommodate up to three persons, two in the bedroom and the third one in the living room, since the sofa is actually a futon couch. The bedroom is very ample and includes, a Queen size bed and bedding, writing desk and armchair, wi-fi connection, 32” Led TV with cable channels (over 80 channels, several of them in other languages rather than Spanish), and a 121 years old piece of furniture: the bedroom’s closet! You will stay in a space that merges the ancient tradition of this late XIXth century’s sea-side suburb called Miraflores with the most recent trend of interior decoration and will make you feel like a local (you can also go to the closest supermarket or grocery store and enjoy cooking at your own taste or trying recipes of Peruvian cuisine).
Both the bathroom and the kitchen room have been totally re-done and are fully equipped; the bathroom is provided with a shower cabin with hydromassage jets, hot water, hair dryer, towels and toiletries; the kitchen room includes an electric stove with range and oven, microwave oven, blender, toaster, coffee maker and also a French coffee press, water boiler, grill maker, rice maker, refrigerator, dishware, glassware, flatware, cookware, etc. and other utensils you may need in everyday life. It is also provided with a washer/dryer machine plus detergent for your laundry, an iron and iron board, as well as an electric vacuum cleaner and other cleansing amenities.

Other things to note
There is a US$25.00 fee for final cleaning service; other cleaning service per diem is available

description:
Since we started building our cabins, the purpose was to be in harmony with nature.
We're now proud to have made that decision.
Awards: Architecture and sustainable construction.
2008 National Honorable Mention. Architecture Biennial.
2016 International Honorable Mention. Terra Award France.
Our place offers a different experience, direct contact with nature, a privileged location overlooking the mountains, the valley and the Inca Trail.

The space
We are also pet-friendly!
You must request the rules for pets and indicate the type of pet you want to accompany you.
As an ecological cabin, its construction is based on local stone, eucalyptus trunks, brought from the Peruvian highlands, and cane from the valley.

24-hour lighting. 24-hour WiFi.

Guest access
La Cabaña has a living room, dining room, sleeping loft, and 1 bathroom. Outside we have a terrace, grill area and clay oven. In addition, inside La Cabaña you can find all the necessary kitchenware for food preparation. We also have bedding and a private bathroom.
To get to the cabin, you have to climb a stone staircase of approximately 3 floors. The car is parked in the parking lot on the first level.

Other things to note
Activities such as hiking, mountaineering, and cycling are recommended.
We are surrounded by beautiful hills, a small valley at our feet, and the Lurín River just 300 meters from our place.
Part of the Inca Trail, which connects Jauja with Pachacamac, accompanies us.

Computer and phone charging. 6:00am to 6:00pm
24-hour Wi-Fi.
24-hour lighting.

listing_name: Beautiful apartment near the sea and gastronomy
description:
Modern and cozy apartment with air conditioning, two rooms and an equipped kitchen. Green area on the ground floor, swimming pool, gym, laundry. Excellent location, two blocks from the ocean. You can walk to the beach across the Bridge of Sighs.
Quiet area but, at the same time, close to bars, restaurants and good music.

The space
Our guests receive guidance before their arrival regarding airport pick-up services, shops, currency exchange and places to visit. The building has a 24-hour front desk. Upon arrival we welcome you and guide you in whatever you need, including a trusted person for cleaning during your stay if you wish (not included in the cost).
I'm nearby so I can come if needed
We also offer our phone numbers where you can always communicate. The apartment has an electric lock and I change the key for each guest, as well as a self-service washer and dryer. It has a well-equipped gym and a beautiful pool.


I receive my guests and help them settle in, if they wish. I introduce them to Irma who has been helping me at home for 20 years (I live nearby) and can help them in whatever they need, such as explaining the operation of the washing and drying area. etc. I give them two phone numbers where they can always communicate. The apartment has an electric lock and I change the code for each guest.

Guest access
The front desk (Help desk) is open 24 hours a day.

The use of the gym, pool and living room are free and the washing and drying machine area works as a self-service throughout the day, and uses token cards that are delivered at reception,

Other things to note
I give my guests a letter with information about the apartment and the neighborhood, as well as the phone numbers to contact me anytime.

listing_name: Work & Relax Miraflores Big Room Near Ocean Walks
description:
Work & Relax — Long Stay in Miraflores.
Spacious, light-filled room with desk, office chair, TV, mini fridge, and private bathroom — ideal for remote work or extended visits. Enjoy peace in family home walking distance to Kennedy Park, Huaca Pucllana, and the oceanfront boardwalk. Walk to diners, yummy bakeries, and gourmet restaurants. Perfect for digital nomads and professionals who want a comfortable home base in the best part of Miraflores. (No pets or smoking.)

The space
Our Private Room #2 for Two. Large clean bedroom, two single beds.
Additional pillows and linens available. Value accommodation for 2 guests splitting expenses. The room has a desk and a chair where you can work, a TV with cable, a mirror and a dresser. The bathroom is a few steps away, on the hallway. The bathroom is shared with the owners if they are in town. Otherwise, you will have the bathroom to yourselves. Superb location, close to everything fun. Walk to Huaca Pucllana and Parque Kennedy. A 10-minute stroll puts you right on the boardwalk action. The boardwalk has tracks to run, bike, and park areas to picnic, exercise, or simply sit down and take in the awesome ocean views, the waves, and the surfers, Sunset is free! Safety is #1.
If you have a cold please use a mask. Handwashing as soon as you return home is expected. No pets. No smoking. No events. No visitors.
Beginning November 2024 Peruvian laws mandate hosts to record guest's IDs. Please provide an image of your passport through the platform or in person. Thanks

Guest access
Guests will get a set of keys to open the exterior gate, home front door, and bedroom door. The apartment is on the second floor, with no elevator. No Parking.

During your stay
Once you check in and you get your keys, you are pretty much Independent. You might see myself, our cleaning lady or run into other guests . We are available and a phone call away in case you need anything. Otherwise, we give you as much privacy as you want. For safety, we highly recommend hand washing as soon as you enter the home. We provide filtered drinkable water.

Other things to note
We feel more comfortable with guests who willingly provide a brief introduction, share purpose of trip, or any other detail that will let us host them better. The closet in the room is off limits, as the owner uses it as storage. No pets. No smoking. No parties. No visitors unless authorized otherwise. Additional charges may apply.
Beginning November 2024 our local government mandates hosts to record Passport, address and telephone information of each guest for security reasons. Please submit a picture of your passport and provide your address. Thank you for your collaboration.

listing_name: Queen BDR in House on Barranco's \Malecón\""
description:
Queen bedroom on the 2nd floor of my three-story house within a safe 1970's community at Barranco´s boardwalk

The space
You'll be staying in my three-story house located on Barranco's boardwalk, a one-minute walk from the Bridge of Sighs and the path down to the beach (Bajada de Baños), and a 1-minute walk from two parks. From one of them you can watch the ocean, and from the other the Bridge of Sighs, La Ermita, and the Bajada de Baños. Barranco's main square is just a four-minute walk away. The beach is approximately a nine-minute walk away. On the second floor, I have two rooms for rent with a full bathroom on the same floor, and half bathroom downstairs, both shared. The ground floor contains the living room, dining room, a small garden and patio, and the kitchen (all shared).
My bedroom, bathroom, and studio are on the third floor, which is exclusively for my use, and is off-limits for guests.

Guest access
Guests have access to the living and dining rooms, the kitchen (light/fast cooking, please), the patio, half bathroom on the first floor, and a full bathroom on the second floor.

Third floor is private and off-limits. My bedroom, bathroom and other personal spaces are there.

During your stay
Unless you arrive very late and my taxi driver drives you here and lets you in, I will be home to greet you and handle the keys. If you need to contact me when I am not at home, you may call me or send me a message via airbnb app, and I will reply as soon as possible.

Other things to note
Peruvian taxes' agency and Immigration now require hosts to fill a form that includes passport (foreigners) or DNI (Peruvian) number of every guest. Please send yours when booking.

If you are very sensitive to humidity, please be aware that in Lima it might reach 99%, and that Barranco (as Miraflores, San Isidro, Chorrillos, etc.) is a coastal district, so it's humid here. I have two dehumidifiers which I can place inside rooms upon request. I will not reimburse money/accept cancellations due to humidity/allergy issues, nor refunds due to change of plans.

If two guests take very long showers before you, you might find water is not hot enough. If that happens, please wait 15 mins and it should be hot again.

There are fans for every room. If there´s none in your room and you want one, please request it.

If you need to wash your clothes, there are several inexpensive laundries in the area (around US $3.50 per 4 kgs) that wash, dry, and fold clothes for you

There's free parking outside the gated community.

For stays longer than a week, I provide towels and linen once a week and toilet paper for the first week. You may buy more in any of the many shops in the neighborhood.

bright, ventilated and very quiet, large closet, single bed, private bathroom shower and casual access to the living-dining room. Includes simple breakfast, fridge space, cupboard for snacks, fruits, sandwiches and hot drinks. Sheets, towels and WiFi.

Safe building in an exclusive area with easy access to adjacent parks. Shops, restaurants, pharmacies and malls are very close at hand. description:
Spacious apartment of 130m2 in Miraflores very well located, half a block away is the park of love and 5 minutes walk; Larcomar. It has 3 bedrooms, with own bathroom, kitchen, laundry and all areas equipped. A parking lot and all the amenities to make you feel at home. Complimentary cleaning for minimum reservations of 7 nights, welcome!

The space
Nice apartment in the heart of Miraflores, 130 m2 with 3 bedrooms with has own bathroom and 1 half guest bathroom. Excellent location being less than 10 minutes from Larcomar, half a block from Parque del Amor and Malecón Cisneros, where you will have the opportunity to appreciate the sunset and play sports.

The apartment is located on the 2nd floor of Bolognesi Street, a residential area but without being far from the best of the area near the boardwalk.

The main room has an interior view and a King bed with a private bathroom and a television. The second bedroom has an interior view and two single beds and a private bathroom. The third bedroom has a street view and a queen bed with a private bathroom. In the living room there is a 2-seater sofa bed for two people and a Smart TV with cable (maximum capacity 8 people).

The kitchen and laundry are fully equipped. An excellent and spacious place where you will be very comfortable. There is a 110 liters hot tub which is enough for 8 people to enjoy a hot shower, however it is recommended that no more than 2 people bathe at a time, because the hot water could run out and you would have to wait for to reheat and fill the tank.

We offer complimentary complete cleanings for minimum reservations of 7 nights, prior coordination of the availability of the day and time of the cleaning staff. The person in charge of the apartment will notify you in advance as soon as the schedule is available.

Enjoy your stay.

¡Welcome!

Guest access
Guests can access all areas of the apartment. They do not share with other people who are not registered in their reservation and authorized .

Other things to note
Summary of MLA Apartments Guest Rules

Key Points for a Pleasant and Safe Stay

1. Check-in and Check-out Times: Normally, check-in is at 4:00 p.m. and check-out is at 11:00 a.m., except for some specific apartments where check-in is after 3:00 p.m. Prompt check-out is mandatory; late check-ins incur a penalty. Early check-in and late check-out have an additional cost (50% of the regular nightly rate). They require coordination and payment in cash.
2. Last-minute Reservations: There may be delays in the delivery of the apartment. It is important to inform the guest of your arrival time to coordinate check-in.
3. Early Access: This is only possible if you have paid for early check-in or if there is availability, after prior coordination.
4. Concierges: They are not affiliated with MLA Apartments and are not trained to assist guests. Any questions should be directed to MLA Apartments staff.
5. Guest Information: A complete guest list and vehicle information must be sent in advance if a garage is required.
6. Parking: Includes one car or truck (subject to availability). Some apartments may offer two garages upon request and coordination.
7. Common Areas: Only available in some buildings and subject to rules and reservations.
8. Amenity Kit: For the first night only (toilet paper, water, basic amenities).
9. Complimentary Quick Cleaning: Weekly for stays of 7 nights or more (no change of bed linens or towels).
10. No Smoking: Smoking is prohibited in any area of ​​the apartment or in common areas. Violation of this policy carries a US$500 fine.
11. Luggage: There is no luggage storage, but luggage can be left at the reception desk of another nearby building. Please inquire and coordinate.
12. Gatherings and Parties: These are not permitted under any circumstances. Failure to comply with this policy will result in a penalty and eviction without refund.
13. Care of Property: The guest is responsible for bed linens, towels, furniture, and appliances. Damages or stains will be charged upon request.
14. Registered Guests Only: Only those included in the reservation may stay overnight. Visitors, changes to the list, or subletting are prohibited.
15. Security: It is recommended that money and valuables be kept in the safe. Access by outsiders is prohibited.
16. Child Care: Balconies and windows do not have special child protection; supervision is requested.
17. Pets: Pets are not allowed.
18. Group Party Reservations: Reservations for bachelor/bachelorette parties, birthday parties, or other celebrations are not accepted.
19. Contract and Guarantee: In some cases, a signed contract and a refundable security deposit (US$150 to US$500) are required. Please inform your purpose of travel to confirm whether this applies to your reservation.
20. Opening Hours: Staff are open Monday through Sunday, 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. There is no 24/7 service. Please maintain communication in case of emergencies.

Thank you for respecting these rules and helping everyone enjoy a safe and pleasant stay!

listing_name: Casita Amelie in Barranco (Little House Amelie in Barranco)
description:
-bohemian artist district of Barranco
-charming duplex in vintage style, quiet street
-beautifully designed entrance area with flowers
-close to the beach, lovely cafes and bars in the immediate vicinity
-boasts a charming wooden mezzanine, where the small office is located

The space
The house was originally a restaurant of Santiago Solari. Together with the architect Nano Cardenas, Susana Castillo rebuilt the restaurant taking special care in preserving the original features of the house and creating 6 individual apartments (Casitas). The restoration of the Casitas took 18 month and was finished in 2016, so that every Casita is newly renovated. The architect has managed, to create each Casita in an individual style!
Throughout her travels, Susana has carefully collected many beautiful items, which now form part of the unique style and ambience of each apartment. Being a personal friend of the well-known Peruvian photographer Walter Silvera, she has acquired some of his work which is beautifully displayed in each apartment. Combining antique and modern furniture and fittings with original artwork makes each “casita” very special reflecting the bohemian style of Barranco. The “casitas” are fully furnished and equipped to live and feel comfortable.

Guest access
You can use the entire cottage to feel comfortable!

Other things to note
The price includes hot water, electricity, WiFi and gardener service every 15 days. The dryer and washing machine are in the patio and are shared with the other houses (there are a total of 6 houses)

description:
Upscale, remodeled house. Located in the heart of Barranco across from the Plaza Espinoza, you’ll be literally steps away from all that this funky, vibrant district has to offer including its restaurants, art galleries, bars and clubs and of course the famous “Bridge of Sighs.” Conveniently located just 2 blocks from a “Metro” grocery store and the Bulevar Metropolitano bus stop.

The space
This private Family-sized Apartment is part of a home that sits atop a Studio and a travel agency that operates M-F (10 am-10 pm). Guest space is located on the 2nd, 3rd and 4th floors.

Floor 2 has 1 Bedroom with a queen-sized bed & a full bathroom across the hallway with a walk-in shower.
The Suite has a 1 Bedroom with a queen-sized bed + 1 Bedroom with 2 single beds + a small living with a private full bathroom with a bathtub or shower.
Hot water is available only in the showers.

Floor 3 features a gourmet kitchen, small full bathroom with walk-in shower and the living and dining room; the dining room table seats 6. The kitchen is fully-equipped with high-end appliances and utensils. The living room features Smart TV. A spiral stair case leads from the kitchen up to Floor 4 and the rooftop terrace and large laundry room.
This private, spacious house is ideal for up to 6 people.

Guest access
This 120 m2, 2-bedroom, house was fully remodeled in 2016 and offers a modern, private oasis in the heart of Barranco. Also include, high-speed wireless internet, washer and ample space to hang clothes for drying, iron and ironing board, hair dryer and security features (smoke alarms, fire extinguishers, security system that provides 24 hrs. access to fire, ambulance and police with the push of a button).
Towels and sheets are provided (weekly change). House includes during your stay complimentary cleaning on Saturdays (time to be coordinated with Host).

Check in 3pm. Check out 12am.
Optional: Pick up from the airport $30

Other things to note
Note: this house is across the street from a nightclub that operates Friday-Saturday nights as well as the District’s fire station. The house’s bedrooms feature noise-reducing windows.
